tool.name: sample_sheettolibinfo
tool.description: Converts experiment metadata from an Excel spreadsheet into a KEY=VALUE format readable by downstream HTGTS Bash pipeline scripts.
tool.command: mkdir -p /outDir && ln -s '$xmlfile' '${xmlfile.element_identifier}' && python3 /Algorithm/sample_sheetTolibInfo.py ${xmlfile.element_identifier} /outDir/fof.txt /outDir/rof.txt $configtype > '$output_log' 2>&1 && tar -chzf outDir_archive.tar.gz -C /outDir . && true
